parameters.query: ={{ "SELECT id, code, email, status FROM tokens WHERE code = '" + $json.token_code.replace(/'/g, '') + "' AND status = 'active' LIMIT 1;" }}

parameters.name: messages

parameters.query: ={{ "INSERT INTO rubrics (programme, module_name, nqf_level, assessment_type, total_marks, parsed_json, original_filename, confirmed) VALUES ('" + $json.programme + "', '" + $json.module_name + "', " + ($json.nqf_level ? $json.nqf_level : 'NULL') + ", '" + $json.assessment_type + "', " + $json.total_marks + ", '" + $json.parsed_json + "', '" + $json.original_filename + "', false) RETURNING id;" }}
={{ "UPDATE tokens SET rubric_id = " + $json.id + " WHERE id = " + $node['Parse Claude Response'].json.token_id + ";" }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ rubric_id: $node['Insert Rubric'].json.id, parsed: $node['Parse Claude Response'].json.parsed_raw }) }}
